Get JWT token for authentication

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"languageChanged":{"type":"boolean"},"languageCode":{"type":"string"},"password":{"type":"string"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"JwtTokenRequest"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"application/hal+json":{"schema":{"type":"object"}}},"description":"Successfully authenticated"},"401":{"content":{"application/hal+json":{"schema":{"type":"object"}}},"description":"Invalid credentials"},"406":{"content":{"application/hal+json":{"schema":{"type":"object"}}},"description":"Password expired"},"500":{"content":{"application/hal+json":{"schema":{"type":"object"}}},"description":"Internal server error"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
